name: wallet-positions
description: Returns fungible and protocol positions for a wallet.

filter[chain_ids].description: Optional chain filter such as ethereum or base.

data.itemAttributes: position metadata, balances, values, protocol context

limitations: Solana currently does not support protocol positions.
Some tokens require a short bootstrap period before appearing.
exampleResponseNotes: Used for balances, token holdings, and DeFi exposure summaries.
